inputs.label: Ore Tonnage
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of ore mined or processed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of ore mined or processed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkarılan veya işlenen toplam cevher kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse des abgebauten oder verarbeiteten Erzes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale de minerai extrait ou traité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total de mineral extraído o procesado.

inputs.label: Ore Grade
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of valuable mineral in the ore.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of valuable mineral in the ore.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des wertvollen Minerals im Erz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de minéral précieux dans le minerai.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de mineral valioso en el mineral.

inputs.label: Recovery Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the valuable mineral that can be recovered during processing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the valuable mineral that can be recovered during processing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşleme sırasında geri kazanılabilen değerli mineral yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des wertvollen Minerals, der während der Verarbeitung zurückgewonnen werden kann.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du minéral précieux pouvant être récupéré lors du traitement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del mineral valioso que se puede recuperar durante el procesamiento.

inputs.label: Metal Price
inputs.businessContext: Market price of the recovered metal per ton.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market price of the recovered metal per ton.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri kazanılan metalin ton başına piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Marktpreis des zurückgewonnenen Metalls pro Tonne.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix du marché du métal récupéré par tonne.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de mercado del metal recuperado por tonelada.

inputs.label: Processing Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to process one ton of ore.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to process one ton of ore.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für die Verarbeitung einer Tonne Erz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de traitement d'une tonne de minerai.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de procesar una tonelada de mineral.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
